heading: Permissions Required
body:
You must have:

- A federated database instance configured for an S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket with read and write
  permissions or [s3:PutObject](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/using-with-s3-actions.html#using-with-s3-actions-related-to-objects)
  permissions.

- A MongoDB user with the [atlasAdmin](atlas/security-add-mongodb-users)
  role or a custom role with the [OUT\_TO\_S3](outToS3) privilege.
